text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 22 

MDCD_FFS_MEDICAL_MOS 

LABEL: Medicaid — Fee-for-Service Medical Coverage Months 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year when the beneficiary had Medicaid FFS Medical 
Coverage. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS DE file (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicaid enrollment or if the plan type code was missing) 

COMMENT: CCW calculates this variable as the count of
